---
title: "From SAS to R, and into HEOR/RWE"
subtitle: "A biostatistician's applied learning journal"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 5
    fields: [date, title, subtitle, categories]
---

::: {.lead}
Hi! I'm a clinical biostatistician (PharmD, MPH) documenting my applied technical transition from clinical SAS programming into R fluency, Real-World Evidence (RWE), and Health Economics and Outcomes Research (HEOR) methodologies. This space is my knowledge vault!
:::

---

## What I write about

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 📘 SAS → R
R fundamentals, tidyverse, pharmaverse, and side-by-side translations of SAS patterns I use every day.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 🔬 HEOR & RWE
Causal inference, statistical models, study design, data sources, and tools used in real-world evidence.
:::

:::

---

## Recent posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](posts.qmd)
